untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires 3-bar sequence (up → inside → up), but backtest engine only supports current and previous bar comparisons (prev_* indicators). The signal requires tracking bar state from 2 bars ago to validate the 3-bar pattern, which cannot be expressed with available indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture the inside day condition (high < prev_high AND low > prev_low) and up days (close > prev_close), but the full pattern validation across 3 consecutive bars cannot be properly implemented. Entry conditions shown represent only the inside day + current up day segment. Original signal mentions 'Outside Day' in source text but rule describes inside day pattern—used inside day interpretation per explicit rule definition.
